feed.title: SAP Community - PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance
feed.subtitle: PLM EAM/Plant Maintenance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Tax Jurisdiction does not come up as default in the Maintenance Order
entry.content:
When I create a Plant Maintenance Order, the Tax Jurisdiction is not coming as a default and we have to enter it manually. The code is maintained for all the Planning and Maint Plants in OX10. 

 

Is there some setting that I am missing?

entry.title: How can i add actual cost and planned cost in Document flow of iw32(order)
entry.content:
In IW32> extras>document for orders> document flow . i want the actual cost and planned cost to be displayed in document flow but unable to find in Document Layout , how to resolve. 

i want the document flow to show Actual cost and Planned cost to each operation/component in it,

entry.title: Suppose if new equipment first service 500 hrs nd every service 1500 how to create maintenance task.
entry.content:
- New equipment has a first service interval of 500 hours

- Subsequent service intervals are every 1500 hours

- The first service order should be automatically generated at 500 hours

- The next service order should be automatically generated at 1500 hours (and so on)

entry.title: How can we assign MIC in breakdown maintenance order
entry.content:
Hi PM/QM experts,

I am trying to create order manually for breakdown maintenance through IW31. After doing maintenance work, equipment need to be inspected. Is it possible to add Master Inspection Characteristics against operations in the same breakdown maintenance order?

entry.title: Notification creates into QMEL-PHASE field '1'
entry.content:
Hello,

 

We have recently transitioned to S/4 HANA and encountered an issue with the QMEL-PHASE field in notifications. In the previous ECC system, this field was not mandatory, but now it requires a value.

 

Our custom program, developed using CBO, is creating notifications with the QMEL-PHASE field set to '1'. However, this is not the standard practice, and the phase should ideally be set to '3' (In Progress).

 

I am not certain which BAPI is responsible for creating or modifying these notifications, but I can provide a list of potentially relevant functions if needed.

 

Apologies for any inconvenience caused by the lack of information or grammatical errors in my previous message.

 

Thank you for your assistance in resolving this matter.

 

Best regards,

entry.title: Maintenance Plan Call Dates called earlier than Call Horizon
entry.content:
Hi,

May I ask for help in explaining why the Call Date for the first Call Object line was called when there is a Call Horizon of 45 DAYS? The details of the Maintenance Plan are as follows:

Maintenance Plan created and scheduled : 29.01.2024

Cycle Unit : 1000 HR

Call Horizon : 45 DAYS

Start Counter Reading : 75830 (counter reading when Maintenance Plan was created)

First Planned Date : 28.05.2024

First Call Date : 17.03.2024

Scheduling indicator : 3 - Performance Based

 

What is the basis of the Call Date? Shouldn't it be based on the Call Horizon? Thank you

entry.title: Restrict another Notification/Maintenance order
entry.content:
Hi,

How to restrict another Notification/Maintenance order creation on Equipment If existing Notification/order is in process for same Equipment.

entry.title: Need to enter measuring document in change maintenance order webdynpro app
entry.content:
I Have mapped a measuring point as running hours as a prt tool for a operation in the task list.

when order is created i have to enter measuring document in order itself. is there any way in standard.

because it is appearing only during the confirmation stage.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Processing Recommendation Data in SAP S/4 HANA On-Premise
entry.content:
Dear Expert, 

Need your support on processing recommendation data in SAP. 

We have a customer who uses a third-party tool for Asset Performance Management (APM). This tool provides recommendation details back to SAP. We need to build an interface to collect this data from the SAP PO-External APM application and bring it into SAP. Once we have received these recommendations, we need to perform the SAP Enterprise Asset Management (EAM) workflow within SAP. For this do we need to build "Recommendation Workbench" feature similar to SAP ASPM(RCM recommendation process). Our customer uses on-premise S4 HANA system. Regarding the review and processing of these Reliability-Centered Maintenance (RCM) recommendation activities, how do we integrate to generate work item in backend system which can reviewed by planner & implement these recommendation. 

Thanks in advance for your support. 

Regards

Amitabh

entry.title: Create URL Attachment on Maintenance Order using BAPI ABAP
entry.content:
Hi need your help,

my requirement is to create/update maintenance order using custom program and create/update URL attachment as well, i have been searching for a while and i can't find any BAPI to help me create URL attachment at all.

Previously i tried BAPI BDS_BUSINESSDOCUMENT_CRE_O_URL  but it could only create attachment as text not URL, what i really need it URL attachment, whereby when user view list attachment they can directly click and redirect to browser to view the web page.

Please help...

entry.title: Master Data configurations design PM EAM
entry.content:
Hi team, I'm after some help with master data configurations design plant maintenance module 

Is there any documents or text books that can assist with this please 

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Data migration issue for functional location task list from ECC to S4 2023 through direct transfer
entry.content:
error :

BOM with cat. [..], number [..], node [..] not found for operation [..]

Error Message
 
Message Class:
CM_EAM_TL_API
 
Message Number:
194
 
Found the below Note but not not S4 core 108

entry.title: Integrating Measurement Points with External Numbers in SAP
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I need your help with integrating another SAP system. We are receiving Measurement Points from this system that we need to duplicate in our own SAP system.

I noticed that SAP does not offer the possibility to create Measurement Points with external numbers. However, I want to retain the same numbers from the other SAP system in our SAP system to facilitate identifying the integration between both systems and handling any modifications.

How can we achieve this?

Thank you in advance for your suggestions.

#sapEAM #sappm #plant maintenance

Regards,

entry.title: IP10 Information message MARA_SINGLE_READ
entry.content: while scheduling Maint plan in IP10 and releasing the call pop with information message appear - MARA_SINGLE_READ. This is in S4 HANA 2023.

entry.title: Data migration SAP PM orders Ecc to S4
entry.content:
Hello Guru's,

My  client wants to migrate historical maintenance orders, close to 15000, from ECC to S4. The status vary from created, rel and closed. I mean there are historical orders included. 

My question is can migrate all the above orders in one single go using LTMC alone?

Will the status of the make any difference?

Please guide me and provide some clarity on this.

Regards

Deepak Doddagoudar

entry.title: Make an existing long text of maintenance order header non-editable
entry.content:
Dear all,

If the functionality to make the Long text of a notification non-editable exists ( see SIMG OLQN_CL & TQ80-QMLTXT02), a similar configuration seems not to be available for the header text of an order ( Maintenance ) 

Kindly suggest a suitable User exit, where a suitable logic could be implemented, to make an existing long text in Maintenance order non-editable in the same way as it's done (~ with the same result ) for QM/PM notification ( see below e.g. ) 

SAP_APPL 617 ^^ 

Tx in advance!

entry.title: Email Triggering for Maintenace Notification in S4 Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi, 

We have a requirement for email triggering functionality to work center responsible person whenever a maintenance notification is created. 

can this be achieved in standard?

Thanks!

entry.title: Email Triggering for Preventive Maintenace Order(On call date) in SAP S4 Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a requirement to trigger email notification for preventive maintenance order on call date in S4 Hana public cloud version. 

Can this functionality be achieved in standard?

Thanks

entry.title: GOS icon dosent appear in T-code iw32 or iw22
entry.content: Hi expert i cant see the GOS icons in my work orders or notification. i dont know what else i have to do make it appear

entry.title: How to get MTBF, MTTR reports in SAP Public cloud ?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
Greetings!!
We are using S/4 Hana Public cloud; we are checking for the MTBF and MTTR reports. Could you please help us know which applications helps here to get the reports and any pre-configuration required for the report to be generated. If any pre-settings need to be maintained in the application and data availability in the system and what are all the filters to be maintained?
Could you please mention us a detailed process of getting the MTBF and MTTR reports.

Regards,
Yaswanth.

PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) 

SAP Asset Performance Management 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Asset Management
